sections.heading: ANNEX II
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on own funds and own funds requirements.

sections.heading: PART II: TEMPLATE RELATED INSTRUCTIONS
sections.description: Instructions related to specific reporting templates.

sections.heading: 3.3 Credit and counterparty credit risks and free deliveries: IRB approach to Own funds Requirements (CR IRB)
sections.description: Overview of the CR IRB template and its scope.

sections.heading: 3.3.1. Scope of the CR IRB template
sections.description: Details on what the CR IRB template covers and what it does not.

sections.heading: 3.3.2. Breakdown of the CR IRB template
sections.description: Description of the seven templates that comprise the CR IRB.

sections.heading: 3.3.2a. Clarifications on the scope of some specific exposure classes referred to in Article 147 of Regulation (EU) No 575/2013
3.3.3. C 08.01 - Credit and counterparty credit risks and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (CR IRB 1)
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on the CR IRB 1 template.

sections.heading: 3.3.4. C 08.02 - Credit and counterparty credit risks and free deliveries: IRB approach to capital requirements: breakdown by obligor grades or pools (CR IRB 2 template)
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on the CR IRB 2 template.

sections.heading: C 08.03 - Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (breakdown by PD ranges (CR IRB 3))
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on the CR IRB 3 template.

sections.heading: C 08.04 - Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (RWEA flow statements (CR IRB 4))
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on the CR IRB 4 template.

sections.heading: C 08.05 - Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (Back-testing of PD (CR IRB 5))
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on the CR IRB 5 template.

sections.heading: C 08.05.1 - Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements: Back-testing of PD in accordance with Article 180(1), point (f), of Regulation (EU) No 575/2013 (CR IRB 5B)
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on the CR IRB 5B template.

sections.heading: C 08.06 - Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (Specialised lending slotting approach (CR IRB 6))
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on the CR IRB 6 template.

sections.heading: C 08.07 - Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (Scope of use of IRB and SA approaches (CR IRB 7))
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on the CR IRB 7 template.

C 08.01.name: Credit and counterparty credit risks and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (CR IRB 1)
C 08.01.description: Reports on the general overview of IRB exposures and methods to calculate risk weighted exposure amounts.
C 08.01.section_heading: 3.3.3. C 08.01 - Credit and counterparty credit risks and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (CR IRB 1)

C 08.02.name: Credit and counterparty credit risks and free deliveries: IRB approach to capital requirements: breakdown by obligor grades or pools (CR IRB 2 template)
C 08.02.description: Reports on the breakdown of exposures assigned to obligor grades or pools.
C 08.02.section_heading: 3.3.4. C 08.02 - Credit and counterparty credit risks and free deliveries: IRB approach to capital requirements: breakdown by obligor grades or pools (CR IRB 2 template)

C 08.03.name: Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (breakdown by PD ranges (CR IRB 3))
C 08.03.description: Reports on the main parameters used for the calculation of capital requirements for IRB approach.
C 08.03.section_heading: C 08.03 - Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (breakdown by PD ranges (CR IRB 3))

C 08.04.name: Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (RWEA flow statements (CR IRB 4))
C 08.04.description: Reports on the changes in risk-weighted exposure amounts over reporting periods.
C 08.04.section_heading: C 08.04 - Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (RWEA flow statements (CR IRB 4))

C 08.05.name: Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (Back-testing of PD (CR IRB 5))
C 08.05.description: Reports on the back-testing results of probability of default (PD) estimates.
C 08.05.section_heading: C 08.05 - Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (Back-testing of PD (CR IRB 5))

C 08.05.1.name: Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements: Back-testing of PD in accordance with Article 180(1), point (f), of Regulation (EU) No 575/2013 (CR IRB 5B)
C 08.05.1.description: Reports on back-testing of PD estimates in accordance with specific regulatory requirements.
C 08.05.1.section_heading: C 08.05.1 - Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements: Back-testing of PD in accordance with Article 180(1), point (f), of Regulation (EU) No 575/2013 (CR IRB 5B)

C 08.06.name: Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (Specialised lending slotting approach (CR IRB 6))
C 08.06.description: Reports on specialised lending exposures and their risk-weighted exposure amounts.
C 08.06.section_heading: C 08.06 - Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (Specialised lending slotting approach (CR IRB 6))

C 08.07.name: Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (Scope of use of IRB and SA approaches (CR IRB 7))
C 08.07.description: Reports on the allocation of exposures subject to IRB and Standardised approaches.
C 08.07.section_heading: C 08.07 - Credit risk and free deliveries: IRB approach to Capital Requirements (Scope of use of IRB and SA approaches (CR IRB 7))
